title: Before You Go
album: Divinely Uninspired To A Hellish Extent (Extended Edition)
why_this_song: Before You Go by Lewis Capaldi (2019) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Was there something I could've said"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Was there something I could've said"
Appears 6 times; first heard in: "Was there something I could've said"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "To make your heart beat better?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "I hate you, I hate you, I hate you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Was there something I could've said
To make your heart beat better?
If only I'd have known you had a storm to weather
Was never the right time, whenever you called
Went little, by little, by little until there was nothing at all
Our every moment, I start to replay

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "there" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "there" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "something" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "something" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: But I was just kidding myself
Well, time can heal, but this won't
If I'd let my walls come down?

exercises.prompt_en: "Before You Go" was released in 2019. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Before You Go" foi lançada em 2019. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Before You Go" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Before You Go" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
